## What does this PR do?
<!-- A short summary. Link any related issue: "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Fix (typo, broken link, wrong command)
- [ ] Content improvement (clarity, exercise, examples)
- [ ] New episode / section
- [ ] Workshop page
- [ ] Infrastructure / tooling

## Checklist
- [ ] I previewed locally (`make preview`) and it renders.
- [ ] `make check` passes (render + link check).
- [ ] Code/commands in the change actually run as written.
- [ ] For new/edited episodes: objectives, ≥1 challenge with solution, and key points are present.
- [ ] Accessibility: images have alt text; links use descriptive text.
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).

## Anything reviewers should focus on?
